summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Banner API fix, Text/Image Banner management, and Withdrawal system. All 18 backend tests passed. All UI tests passed. Banner 404 issue is FIXED.
critical_code_review_comments: Code structure is good - routes are properly defined AFTER include_router fix
Banner API correctly returns {text, color, images} structure
Withdrawal API properly validates PIN and minimum amount (100)
Admin endpoints properly check admin role
seed_data_creation: Admin user auto-seeded on startup via startup_event
context_for_next_testing_agent: Banner API 404 issue is FIXED. All banner endpoints working: GET /api/banner, POST /api/admin/banner/text, POST /api/admin/banner/image, POST /api/admin/banner. Withdrawal endpoint POST /api/wallet/withdraw requires PIN verification and minimum 100 amount. Admin withdrawals list at GET /api/admin/withdrawals. Shopping/Vendor APIs are MOCKED with basic CRUD. Bank payout in withdrawal is NOT integrated (status stays pending until admin approves).

banner_api.POST /api/admin/banner/text: PASS - Updates text banner with admin auth
banner_api.POST /api/admin/banner/image: PASS - Updates image banners with admin auth
banner_api.POST /api/admin/banner: PASS - Combined update for backward compat

withdrawal_api.GET /api/admin/withdrawals: PASS - Lists withdrawal requests for admin

ui_features.login_flow: PASS - Admin login works with correct credentials
ui_features.dashboard_text_banner: PASS - Shows text banner with gradient
ui_features.dashboard_image_banner: PASS - Shows image slider when images exist
ui_features.admin_panel_access: PASS - Admin Panel button visible for admin users
ui_features.banner_tab_subtabs: PASS - Text Banner and Image Banner sub-tabs present
ui_features.text_banner_form: PASS - Text input, color selector, preview, save button
ui_features.image_banner_form: PASS - Image URL input, add/remove images, save button

mocked_apis_list: Bank payout in withdrawal - status stays pending until admin approves
